issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill assumes Ruby 2.7+ or Docker, limiting cross-platform compatibility.
Missing checksum verification for source installation.

scenarios.name: Bulk subdomain fingerprinting with JSON output
scenarios.rationale: Baseline loops manually with grep filtering while treatment uses -i/--log-json/--wait/--max-threads/-a 3 plus a targeted jq pipeline over .plugins.WordPress.

scenarios.name: Stealthy WAF + security headers compliance scan
scenarios.rationale: Baseline offloads WAF and header checks to other tools while treatment runs whatweb -a 1 across all targets with --log-json and post-processes via jq.
